steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The blank connects a sentence about Hudson College to a sentence about Piedmont Tech University. Both are examples supporting the claim that African American history courses exist across the US. The transition must signal a shift to a new, separate location.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — In other words,: Signals a restatement or clarification of the previous sentence, not an introduction of a new location. ✗
  • Choice B — Thus,: Signals a logical consequence or conclusion drawn from what came before — Piedmont Tech University is not a result of Hudson College. ✗
  • Choice C — In particular,: Signals that a specific detail about the previous example follows — but Piedmont Tech University is a separate institution, not a detail about Hudson College. ✗
  • Choice D — Elsewhere,: Means ‘in another place,’ which is exactly right for shifting from Hudson College to a different university in a different location. ✓
That matches Choice D — Elsewhere,.
